reviews.review_description:
As soon as i saw this on the store i had to buy it as a lad growing up wanting items like this now to have it all in VR is just amazing.
tell me were you can sit in VR with some songs and mix away at your hearts content the mixers and cds are just like the real things plus you have the app version on the head set plus a version on the PC. The work shops and how to help you learn to mix better are spot on. I was lucky and got a free life account but even if i did not i would still pay the full price for this now as if you would have to buy them in real life your looking at £6000 for the mixer & £3000 each for the CDs in the app or software which one you want to call it plus you get different CDS & Mixers plus Drum Machine,Turn Tables and so much more If your in to mixing music is the best software out there in VR

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, and we are glad you are enjoying all of the content we offer on the platform.  Please let us know what you want to see next by replying here or posting to the Suggestions channel on our Discord: http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_description:
If this was a thing when I first started spinning records, well lets just say I'd be living my dream playing next to Oakenfold and some of the other Greats. 

With the built in lessons and workshops, ANYONE can become a DJ even if its only for themselves.  Then could always work your way up to utilizing the collaboration with MYX ARCADIA and put on a show for others in a digital club. My oldest son has anxiety kinda bad (we're working on it and it's getting a lot better) but music has always been an outlet and way for grounding. He's always wanted to play in front of a crowd but when he thinks too much on it his anxiety kicks in. With Tribe XR and MYX ARCADIA we're gonna work to get him "on stage" then take it from there. 

Thanks Tribe XR, for more than you could've known!!

Hello there everyone I’m Dj Cerberus and well known as Chukiemello in the tribe community I would like to say after 3 to 4 years of starting my Dj career in Tribe XR the app is worth it for the price that you pay to get the game it’s worth buying if you can’t afford Dj equipment and want to learn how to Dj. I can say that every workshop in tribe has its own twist to it there always new things to master and the people that you get to work with are top notch. I would recommend this if your trying to start a Dj career but if you are already a Dj this is a good way to show others what you got.

developer_response.body:
Hey Cerberus, we definitely remember you in the workshops and glad you are still at it! Come by the Discord and drop some of your recent mixes, we would love to hear more...
http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_description: I’ve owned this for some time and have never properly reviewed it. Tribe DJ is one of my regularly used app.  As a real life DJ I can attest to the accuracy of it all.  Being able to connect with others and share music and experiences has been amazing.  The app is constantly evolving.  I could solidly DJ a whole gig from my device with this program.  It’s also cool for just hanging out and jamming with friends.  They have tutorials and weekly meet ups.  I can’t recommend it enough.  Update: Just rolling by again in 2026 to say Tribe is still the best. Loving the 360 environments.  Hope to unlock the Power Station.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback r2-3po! Glad the software matches up with your real life experience. Please reach out via email or on Discord and let us know how we can make things even more accurate and useful for a performing DJ.

Hit us up at support@tribexr.com if power station does not unlock for any reason and we'll make sure you are good.

reviews.review_description:
This is one of my favorite Apps! Love the fact.that you can learn about DJ'ing and use state-of-the art DJ equipment while learning. The different environments are awesome. I purchased the Lifetime access and have no regrets. I definitely recommend this App! Very nice experience.

Update: 06/06/26:
After using the App for now for quite some time, I wanted to give some additional feedback. 

I've learned so much about DJ'ing and DJ equipment. Truely one of my favorite Apps. I love how you can use different equipment, in different environments, and there are a variety of sources available to load music. I currently utilize TIDAL, but there are several other options. There are periodic updates to the App, regular workshops and other live learning opportunities. 

I was never interested in DJ'ing until after spending some time using this App. To be able to go directly into my streaming service in TIDAL and apply some of the DJ'ing techniques from the 5-Day DJ Challenge was pretty awesome! I've learned about using hot cues, loops, transitions, beat matching, applying different effects (FX), and so many other topics. I have no complaints, but below are a few considerations for potential enhancements:

1. Consider ways to integrate a web browser direcly in the App that could connect some of the teaching concepts or equipment to a hyperlink in a web browser where you can have additional quick access to learn even more about a specific topic or equipment. I personally did my own research outside of the App, but it would have been nice to have a direct link within the App that links to a website, article, YouTube video, or other source with additional insight into the topic. 

2. It would also be nice if AI was integrated directly into the App or web browser where you could ask a question and receive the answer or be taken to an area either within or outside the App that provides insight into the question. You might want to consider if this is possible and/or worth implementing. 

3. In one or more of the teaching lessons, cosider discussing the difference between several categories or equipment (i.e., CDJs vs. Controllers, Stand Alone Units vs. Laptop Dependant equipment, Drum Machines and other add-on devices, etc.) and/ or other topics on interest in the DJ community. I've already learned a lot through the App and this could potentially enhance learning opportunities. 

These were just a few thoughts for potential areas for future enhancements, but I understand that there is a cost-benefit trade off to consider which would need to be factored into the App's pricing structure, so, all things considered, I would still continue giving TRIBE XR - DJ Academy a 5 star raring 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟! Keep up the great work!

developer_response.body:
Hi Joseph and thank you for your extensive feedback here!  Your first two points have been discussed quite a bit for possible development, so great to hear that you would fine those useful features!  We have a similar AI mentor setup on our DDJ-FLX4 web application at http://dj.tribexr.com that we would love to bring into VR with voice to text as well.  We'll be working on that during the summer.

Third point is a great idea and I'll add it to my to-do list for extended learning in the app.  I'll pass this whole review on to the rest of the team as well. 

- Tsickle
Tribe XR Community Manager

reviews.review_description:
My friend is learning how to DJ along with me, though she's using a physical deck and a video course compared to me , my quest and my tribe sub. We're both learning pretty fast, but I think the friction for catching time to practice is WAY lower for me. I need 60 seconds to gear up for practice ( turn on the headset... anywhere) to her 15 minutes of setup, so I get more play time in, and am showing her where things are ... on her own kit! 😂. Turns out the VR still builds you the muscle memory for the equipment! 
Tribe gets better and better. And my friend is getting a quest now...

developer_response.body:
Glad you are enjoying Tribe Jayhawwk. The muscle memory thing is real, as a few of us have learned completely in Tribe and went immediately to real kit and smashed it!

Let us know how we can further support your DJ learning journey!

- Team Tribe XR

reviews.review_description: Im using it for a while now, it is very complete, I love the small comunity on it. Like a Dj beginner this app is very useful to push me into the dj world, cause you dont have to set up everything to start playing. Maybe this can be better if you can connect the googles to a speaker so you can heard just the session in the speaker and the mixing in your headphones or the ones in the googles.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! You can actually connect the VR googles/headset to a speaker using a splitter cable and selecting the L/R option in audio settings.  That way you can still hear the cue in your headphones while sending Master Output.  More info on this page or reach out if you need more assistance!

https://help.tribexr.support/split-audio/quest

reviews.review_description: I've been using Tribe for a good few years now and once I got it, after DJing for about a week with it I decided to get the subscription. I have no regrets. the quality is insane, the UI layouts and even the functionality of the gear is amazing. very real, I've actually gigs a few house parties using Tribe. this app is amazing for beginers or even the pros who just dont wanna bring their gear around. using it to practice is great, and all you need is your headset.

developer_response.body: Amazing to hear you've enjoyed the virtual gear, and used it at IRL parties too!

THANK YOU TEAM FOR YOU HELP!

reviews.review_title: Was cool for 1 day, then it broke
reviews.review_description: Yesterday I was going through the lessons and enjoying this awesome tool, then tonight all of the music related audio decided it didnt want to play. All the tutorial voice over audios work, but any time music is played its completely silent. Doesn't work anywhere in the app, the jog wheels wont even navigate the songs so it must not be loading the songs at all. Shame, now I have to go buy an actual deck for twice the price when I was planning on buying the lifetime tribe subscription.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that you had an issue! It sounds like an super-rare issue i've only seen once before on a Quest device.  In that case it was resolved with a reinstall of the application.  

If you could give that a try and reach out to support@tribexr.com or Discord we would love to get a shot at fixing this for you so you can have a proper 7 day trial.

- Tsickle
Community Manager

reviews.review_description:
The only thing that can be better is a real physical controller. Without the tactile feel of real buttons, knobs, etc. it still gives a pretty good simulation of pioneer equipment for learning. I understand it can connect to real controllers as well but it would have to be a supported model like the DDJ-FLX4 which I dont have (I have the older model DDJ-400).
Update: question for the dev(s). You confirmed the physical DDJ-400 can work with TribeXR. How do I connect it properly? I tried using a USB-A to C cable and USB A to USB B adapter. The USB C plugs into my Quest 3. The USB A end plugs into the adapter which ends in USB B that plugs into the DDJ-400 but it doesn't light up (not enough power?). Or do I have to use the PCVR version of TribeXR for this to work. Any tutorials or details online? I tried to find the information or videos but couldn't find anything specific. Lastly, can I get the professional dj powerstation visual environment unlocked? It says it will unlock after 15 minutes of leaving a review but it's been more than a day now. Thank you in advance!

developer_response.body:
Hey fruitboy99! Glad you are enjoying the simulation of real controllers.  

You actually can use your DDJ400 with Tribe, and most (but not necessarily all) controls will still work! Give it a try and let us know how well it works for you.

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying Tribe and learning in advance of using real equipment! We are also manifesting some CDJs in your life rn...

reviews.review_description:
I'm a customer who purchased this in 2020.  I hadn't played in such a long time that when I dusted off my Quest 3 and jumped in, I was surprised to see Tribe XR is now subscription-based.  My heart sank because I knew I'd already purchased this in the past (twice...once on Steam and once on Meta).  

I immediately ran to the review page of Tribe XR to see if anyone was mentioning this conundrum and the very first review I saw was by someone who was also facing this.  Fortunately, this person's review described how they reached out to Tribe XR's support email and found out older users can be grandfathered into a lifetime subscription for free!

I reached out to support and was promptly contacted and asked to provide proof of my prior purchase of the game (I used my PayPal purchase history and Meta purchase history on PC to locate this info).  Sent them a screenshot of my purchase proof and I was asked to create a Tribe XR account and my associated email address was quickly given a lifetime subscription!

When I opened up Tribe XR, I was back in action without a hiccup!  The customer support was extremely prompt, helpful, and friendly!  As for the app itself, it's an incredible learning tool and it is never drab or boring to me.  My dad, a Chicago DJ who's spun house records since the 80s, was even impressed as he now uses CDJs himself. 

If there's one thing I really wish were different...it would be the upward floating shimmery stars effect that surrounds the DJ area.  It gives me motion sickness by causing me to feel like I'm in an elevator, perpetually moving down.  I looked everywhere to find a way to disable this effect but there seems to be nothing I can do and that honestly does limit how much I can play per session.  Please, allow users to change and/or disable this effect, it would help greatly with motion sickness!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the customer support shout out and your feedback on passthrough.  In Freeplay mode (after the onboarding), you won't experience the floating particles.  Our next build lso removes that automatically after the first session, even with the free-to-play mode. 

Reach out to support@tribexr.com if you have any issues switching to free play, or have any other questions!

reviews.review_description: You can’t use the free trial with out paying something first. Don’t waste your time with this one. I’m sure there’s better out there that are not misleading with their information.

developer_response.body:
You won’t need to pay to start the free trial, as you only need to confirm a payment method on your account to have full access to Tribe for 7 days. If you don’t wish to pay you can always cancel ahead of that and retain the rest of your trial.

After that, you’ll still have access to a free version of Tribe for mixing on the DDJ-FLX4 without limits.

reviews.review_description: hello there can someone please help me on how to renew mat subscription as im having a hard time to get it back

developer_response.body: Yes, we can help you out ASAP so please reach out to support@tribexr.com or post to the #help channel in our Discord: http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_description: I love streaming my sets to twitch direct from Tribe

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoy the twitch integration leek!

reviews.review_description: I seriously have not played another game since I got this. I can literally spend 2-3 hours playing around on these deck after linking my music Playlists. It is soon much fun!

developer_response.body:
Thanks Drayton! We've got some new features and equipment on deck so look out for those. Also, make sure to join up with the rest of the community on our Discord server:
http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_description: Here bcuz I was asking for a friend of mine 😂💕 I’ve been watching from Twitch and the Nina Vibes are 🎶💕🎶💕🎧💕🎧💕I enjoy the LIVE sessions and I stay in the comment section. I’m 4 days into my Quest VR experience. I watched in my Vr browser last night Thirsty Thursdays on Twitch…the surround sound beats my laptop audio any night. But I actually prefer to be a part of the environment and I took my first tour in this app took me a minute to realize the controller functions. I just gotta quit hitting the green button late or early but I’m about to go into the next part of the learning and see what else I can learn and discover. I know a lot of people who want to be heard but not seen the avatar feature will give them the opportunity to be apart. They just gotta get their headset now, so I’ll definitely be continuing to spread this word and continue to share Nina‘s videos on TikTok and shout out to DJ NAGA9UNA

developer_response.body: Hello Ishram! It's great to hear of your awesome experience with Tribe and our community events.  Check out our multiple daily workshops so we can help accelerate your DJ Journey...

reviews.review_description: Definitely one of my favorite apps that's more than just a game. Very professional if you love DJing or want to be social with others who love music and DJing. Awesome...highly recommended.

developer_response.body:
Thanks Monky! It's great having you involved in our community after many years, please keep sharing your mixes and streams with us in the Discord...

http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_description: All of u are awesome and respectful I've been doing this for over 2 yrs so thank you

developer_response.body: Thanks Jhero, it's been great to see your skills and selection grow over the past year or so, keep going!

reviews.review_description:
If youre looking for a good djing game, this is it. Scrap every other one. 

Incredibly fun, not to mention accurate. Connects to a variety of different music platforms (beatport, soundcloud, etc) a must have game.

Could use a few more environments and stuff but other than that i love it

developer_response.body:
Thanks Snuglii! We will be adding in 360 degree video environments soon that will give a whole different immersive vibe.  Give it a go when it's out and let us know how you like it on our Discord.

http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_description: The attention to detail is incredible!

developer_response.body: Thanks DJ Scratch! Make sure to join our Discord at http://discord.gg/tribexr to connect with the rest of our community. We'd love to hear your mixes in Tribe...

reviews.review_description: Wish there was more go live options but love this game

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback.  We would love to hear what other options you would like to see for livestreaming.  Let us know at support@tribexr.com or post in #suggestions channel inside our Discord server:
http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_title: Great for practice or for starters
reviews.review_description: An amazing program for people looking to get into djing or to refine their skills, as someone who gets the opportunity to play quite often this has really helped me perfect my abilities on cdjs without having to spend a ridiculous amount of money on physical decks

developer_response.body: Thanks James! Make sure to join up on our Discord if you haven't, so you can post clips of your sets, ask questions, and suggest what new equipment and features you want to see next!

reviews.review_title: DJ OR NOT GET THIS APP
reviews.review_description: Tribe has been the best experience ive had in my struggle to learn how to dj. The courses and even people you meet through the online mode teach you so much and in a way that is understandable if you've been wanting to learn or even just play if you already know then GET THIS APP

developer_response.body: Thanks Sarge! Great to have you in workshops.  If you aren't on our Discord server check it out, post your twitch streams and recorded mixes, and leave us suggestions for future features!

reviews.review_description: i havent turned on my ddj flx 4 for a while and when i heard that tribe xr now has a demo with it i tried and its insanely accurate

developer_response.body: Great to hear you jumped back into DJing with Tribe XR.  Have you tried using your FLX4 with Tribe by plugging it in via USB-C? You can control the virtual FLX4, and even multiplayer B2B with it!

reviews.review_description: I've had this amazing title since it's release and I've loved every moment.

developer_response.body: Thanks Dee! Make sure to let us know what features and improvements you would like to see us tackle next, via email at support@tribexr.com or jump into Discord http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_description: Best game ever love no one should call this game bad
Good game shame you cant import songs from apple music or spotify. Great if youve got an hour or 2 to kill

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback!  We are doing our best to bring both Apple Music and Spotify as soon as possible.  The expectation is that we will probably integrate both, once they open up the DJ streaming SDK to a wider group of developers.

reviews.review_description: Great community and great experience. Me and my mate are learning djing in real life at a school and using tribexr to get used to our drills until we decide to get gear, so realistic and awesome rooms as well.

I've been and knowing this it's been a really great journey so far. In any case, I think that This is an outlet for people to start learning how to DJ and getting into that field. Thanks team for all that they do and cheers to more DJs! ❤️❤️

developer_response.body:
Thanks for joining in with the Tribe, let us know what features and equipment you want to see next on our Discord!
http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_description: Really realistic and the best way to learn how to DJ without spending a lot of money ￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks Aston! We've got some new features and equipment on deck so look out for those. Also, make sure to join up with the rest of the community on our Discord server:
http://discord.gg/tribexr

reviews.review_description: I love tribe

developer_response.body: Thanks Liam! Always great to see you in the workshops and chilling in the Tribe Lounge.  Let us know what you want to see in Tribe XR next...

reviews.review_description: At First i had Problems with Findung a platform where i can use my own Songs, but it worked perfectly with Dropbox. Nixe game So far!

developer_response.body: Thanks Julian! Dropbox is definitely convenient...you can also drop songs directly onto your headset storage in the "Music" directory.
